areas_proposed.label: Member-management UI surface
areas_proposed.description: Where clan leaders/officers manage their clan: Filament-only / dedicated /my-clan / hybrid / defer-to-polish

areas_proposed.label: Slug + URL strategy
areas_proposed.description: Clan slug source (tag vs name; user-editable vs auto). Player slug source (Discord username is not stable; custom slug, UUID, sequential). Routes /clans/{slug}, /players/{slug} and slug-collision policy.

areas_proposed.label: Privacy tier semantics
areas_proposed.description: Precise definition of public/community/clan/private for /players/{slug}. Specifically what 'community' resolves to for an authenticated visitor; what 'clan' means relative to the player's CURRENT active membership.

areas_proposed.label: Invite/application flow + notifications
areas_proposed.description: Invite (clan->player) vs Application (player->clan) UX. Notifications (in-app only for P2? Discord bot DM deferred to P5?). Multi-pending/cancel/expire policy. Self-cancel.

Phase 1 SUMMARYs (UserResource/PlayerResource shipped; activitylog wired; spatie/laravel-permission installed with default_guard=web)
